clause: The system must not be used to produce misleading realistic images or videos, or to impersonate real people, in ways that enable deception that can harm democratic or criminal justice institutions.
source_title: Code de conduite volontaire visant un développement et une gestion responsables des systèmes d'IA générative avancés

clause: No person shall make available an artificial intelligence system if the system is likely to generate content that incites violence or hatred.
source_title: C-27 (44-1) - LEGISinfo - Parliament of Canada

clause: No person shall make available an artificial intelligence system if the system is likely to generate content that is defamatory or that infringes privacy.
source_title: C-27 (44-1) - LEGISinfo - Parliament of Canada

clause: No person shall make available an artificial intelligence system if the system is likely to generate content that is obscene, indecent, or sexually explicit.
source_title: C-27 (44-1) - LEGISinfo - Parliament of Canada

clause: Providers shall not generate illegal content, including obscene materials.
source_title: Alien Chat: China's 1st Case of Criminal Responsibility for AI-Generated Content

clause: A generative AI service must not generate content that incites ethnic hatred or ethnic discrimination.
source_title: Comparison Chart of Current vs. Draft rules for Generative AI

clause: A generative AI service must not generate content that incites violence or obscenity.
source_title: Comparison Chart of Current vs. Draft rules for Generative AI

clause: A generative AI service must not generate content that infringes others' reputation, privacy, or other lawful rights and interests.
source_title: Comparison Chart of Current vs. Draft rules for Generative AI

clause: A generative AI service must not generate content that promotes terrorism or extremism.
source_title: Comparison Chart of Current vs. Draft rules for Generative AI

clause: The publication of illegal content is prohibited, regardless of whether new technologies were employed to assist the creation of that content.
source_title: Douyin’s Platform Norms and Industry Initiatives on Content Generated by Artificial Intelligence

clause: Content that incites subversion of national sovereignty or the overturn of the socialist system, endangers national security and interests or harms the nation’s image, incites separatism or undermines national unity and social stability, advocates terrorism or extremism, promotes ethnic hatred and ethnic discrimination, violence and obscenity, or fake and harmful information must not be generated.
source_title: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative Artificial Intelligence Services

clause: Effective measures shall be employed to prevent the creation of discrimination such as by race, ethnicity, faith, nationality, region, sex, age, profession, or health.
source_title: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative Artificial Intelligence Services

clause: prevent discriminatory content, including content based on race, country, sex, or health discrimination
source_title: Key Changes to Generative AI Measures

clause: Content generated using generative AI shall embody the Core Socialist Values and must not incite subversion of national sovereignty or the overturn of the socialist system, incite separatism, undermine national unity, advocate terrorism or extremism, propagate ethnic hatred and ethnic discrimination, or have information that is violent, obscene, or fake, as well as content that might disrupt the economic or social order.
source_title: Overview of Draft Measures on Generative AI

clause: Service providers must take active measures to prevent discrimination based on race, ethnicity, country, faith, sex, age, or occupation during the selection of training data, model generation and fine-tuning, and provision of services, and such factors must not result in discriminatory content generation based on users’ characteristics.
source_title: Overview of Draft Measures on Generative AI

clause: The generative AI service must not generate content that incites subversion of state power or overthrow of the socialist system.
source_title: downloadfile.jsp

clause: The generative AI service must not generate content that promotes ethnic hatred or ethnic discrimination.
source_title: downloadfile.jsp

clause: The generative AI service must not generate content that promotes obscenity, pornography, gambling, violence, or incites crime.
source_title: downloadfile.jsp

clause: The generative AI service must not generate content that promotes terrorism or extremism.
source_title: downloadfile.jsp

clause: During processes such as algorithm design, the selection of training data, model generation and optimization, and the provision of services, measures are to be employed to prevent the occurrence of discrimination such as by race, ethnicity, faith, nationality, region, sex, age, or profession.
source_title: 生成式人工智能服务管理办法 （征求意见稿）

clause: Generated content must not contain content that subverts state power, overthrows the socialist system, incites secession, undermines national unity, promotes terrorism or extremism, promotes ethnic hatred or ethnic discrimination, or contains violence, obscene or pornographic information, false information, or content that may disrupt economic order or social order.
source_title: 生成式人工智能服务管理办法 （征求意见稿）

clause: Providers must respect others' lawful interests and prevent harm to others' physical and mental health, damage to portrait rights, reputation rights, and personal privacy, and infringement of intellectual property rights; illegal acquisition, disclosure, or use of personal information, privacy, and trade secrets is prohibited.
source_title: 生成式人工智能服务管理办法 （征求意见稿）

clause: Respect the lawful rights and interests of others, prevent harm to the physical and mental health of others and their image rights, reputation rights, personal privacy, and the infringement of intellectual property rights. The illegal acquisition, disclosure, and use of personal information and privacy, as well as commercial secrets, is prohibited.
source_title: 生成式人工智能服务管理办法 （征求意见稿）

clause: must not generate content that incites subversion of state power, overthrow of the socialist system, endangers national security or interests, damages the national image, incites secession, undermines national unity or social stability, promotes terrorism or extremism, promotes ethnic hatred or ethnic discrimination, or contains violence, obscene pornography, or false harmful information prohibited by law or administrative regulations

clause: A generative AI service must not generate content that incites subversion of state power, overthrow of the socialist system, endangers national security or interests, harms the national image, incites secession, undermines national unity or social stability, promotes terrorism or extremism, promotes ethnic hatred or ethnic discrimination, or contains violence, obscenity, pornography, or other false and harmful information prohibited by law.

clause: Circumvent regulatory controls to acquire weapons or their precursors.

clause: Create or distribute malware, ransomware, or other types of malicious code.

clause: Create, distribute, or promote child sexual abuse material (“CSAM”), including AI-generated CSAM.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: Design or develop weaponization and delivery processes for the deployment of weapons.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: Develop, promote, or otherwise facilitate the sale or distribution of fraudulent or deceptive products.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: Facilitate or promote any act of violence or intimidation targeting individuals, groups, animals, or property.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: Incite, facilitate, or promote violent extremism, terrorism, or hateful behavior.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: Misuse, collect, solicit, or gain access without permission to private information such as non-public contact details, health data, biometric or neural data (including facial recognition), or confidential or proprietary data.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: Produce, modify, design, or illegally acquire weapons, explosives, dangerous materials or other systems designed to cause harm to or loss of human life.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: Provide material support for organizations or individuals associated with violent extremism, terrorism, or hateful behavior.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: Synthesize, or otherwise develop, high-yield explosives or biological, chemical, radiological, or nuclear weapons or their precursors, including modifications to evade detection or medical countermeasures.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: Violate privacy rights as defined by applicable privacy laws, such as sharing personal information without consent or accessing private data unlawfully.
source_title: Usage Policy \ Anthropic

clause: A person is liable to a civil action if the person publishes, performs, distributes, transmits, or otherwise makes available to the public an individual's voice or likeness, with knowledge that use of the voice or likeness was not authorized by the individual or, in the case of a minor, the minor's parent or legal guardian, or in the case of a deceased individual, the executor or administrator, heirs, or devisees of such deceased individual.
source_title: HB2091.pdf

clause: No generative artificial intelligence service may generate child sexual abuse material.
No generative artificial intelligence service may generate content that promotes self-harm.
No generative artificial intelligence service may generate content that promotes terrorism.
No generative artificial intelligence service may generate content that promotes violence.
No generative artificial intelligence service may generate sexually explicit content involving a minor.
